themes: Managers across multi-unit franchise and residential property brands make up nearly the entire backlog, signaling that day-to-day location management workflows and reporting efficiency are the dominant pain points SOCi needs to address.

A significant portion of contacts have been waiting 90 days or more — many over 200 days — pointing to a systemic prioritization gap where frontline manager feedback has gone unaddressed long enough to risk account retention and trust.

Several accounts appear multiple times (Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Avenue5 Residential, Holiday Inn Express, Ford, Anytime Fitness, and others), suggesting that product gaps in these accounts are broad enough to affect multiple team members and warrant coordinated, account-level follow-up rather than one-off conversations.
